events.name: PCE Price Index (MoM)
events.description: THE Fed's preferred inflation gauge. More important than CPI for rate decisions.
events.avxBias: Hot PCE = Bleeding Edge or Panic Farm. Cool PCE = Pea

events.name: Core PCE (MoM)
events.description: Excludes food & energy. The number Fed watches most closely.
events.avxBias: Drives rate expectations. Hot = risk-off. Cool = risk-on.

events.name: UMich Consumer Sentiment (Final)
events.description: Consumer confidence snapshot. Inflation expectations embedded.
events.avxBias: Weak sentiment = risk-off pressure. Strong = momentum.

summary: PCE day — the Fed's preferred inflation gauge drops at 8:30 AM ET. Hot numbers = rate hike fears = risk-off. Cool numbers = rate cut hopes = risk-on. AVAX typically amplifies BTC moves by 1.5-2x.
